results.name: Org isolation validator
results.stdout:
======================================
 FactoryOPS Org Isolation Validator
======================================

  PASS: Super admin login works
Using tenant pair: Test-01 (01KNHPZSCFCN0EW94DX55HEWBX) vs Certification Validation Secondary (01KNHXECECC2NKG4R7GZFDKT8P)
  PASS: Primary org admin login works
  PASS: Secondary org admin login works
  PASS: Plant manager login works

-- Backend API checks --

  PASS: Super admin fleet-snapshot without tenant scope fails closed
  PASS: Primary tenant fleet snapshot is tenant-scoped
  PASS: Secondary tenant fleet snapshot is tenant-scoped
  PASS: Primary org admin summary excludes secondary tenant data
  PASS: Primary org admin fleet snapshot works without tenant param
  PASS: Foreign tenant override is rejected for org admin

-- Auth checks --

  PASS: Primary org admin role is org_admin
  PASS: Primary org admin belongs to primary org
  PASS: Secondary org admin belongs to secondary org only
  PASS: Plant manager role and plant scope are correct

-- Internal API security checks --

  PASS: Reporting notification settings reject tenantless internal requests
  PASS: Reporting notification settings accept tenant-scoped internal requests

-- Cross-service absence checks --

  PASS: Rules list for primary org excludes secondary tenant identifier
  PASS: Waste history remains tenant-scoped between org admins
  PASS: Analytics jobs for primary org exclude secondary sample device

-- TypeScript check --

  PASS: TypeScript zero errors

======================================
 Results: 20 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked
======================================

 ALL PASSED. Org isolation smoke checks are current.
